name: Diane
description: A 21-15-9 couplet pairing heavy deadlifts with handstand push-ups — two very different skill demands, raw posterior-chain strength and inverted pressing, under the same descending rep scheme as Fran.
source_notes: crossfit.com/faq/wod (official CrossFit FAQ, 'Explain The Workouts with Names (the Girls)?'), retrieved 2026-07-08
